text: arXiv 2606.19323v1. Equation ℝ^n ×M_-. Matched concepts: Real Number, Exponentiating, Variable, Multiplication, Subtraction. Real Number means a Real Number is a mathematical concept used as a named object, value, or quantity in formal mathematical discourse.
